_comment: Forge probe answers (04-01). A born-conformant scaffold input: single-thread roster, no A7 components. Used by test_scaffold.py and the plan's standalone-fallback acceptance command.
description: Produce a task- and site-specific probe artifact that forces specificity and the hierarchy of controls. Use when a manager or consultant needs a defensible probe output for a concrete task, site, or asset — never for generic or template-only output.
